issue_description: Hello, I'm having trouble with my account. My username is jsmith and my account number is 1234-5678-9012-3456. Please contact me at john.smith@company.com or call me at +1-555-123-4567.

conversations.message: Hi, I need help with my account. My email is john.smith@company.com and my phone is +1-555-123-4567.
Hello John, I'll help you. I can see your account details. Let me check your account number 1234-5678-9012-3456.
Thanks Sarah. My address is 123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001 if you need to send anything.
